{{Quote|Soldiers are expendable tools for politicians like her, who don't like to muddy or bloody their hands with the defense of the Republic. Yet it was soldiers who liberated her world a decade ago, and now she's calling us cowards.|Laslo Dorits referring to Senator Padmé Amidala|<ref name="Hnn">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|45|news/13228_4.html|Stark Veterans Blast Amidala}}</ref>}}
'''Laslo Dorits''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] soldier.

==Biography==
Laslo Dorits fought for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]]. He later became a member of the [[Stark Veteran Assembly]], and had become its spokesperson by [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]]. He was an avid supporter of the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]] and an opponent of the policies of [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]].<ref name="Hnn" />

{{Char-stub}}
